append.xpath: /entity_classes/entity_class[property[@name='Tags' and (contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieArlene') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieBowler') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieFemaleFat') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombiePartyGirl'))]]/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']

/entity_classes/entity_class[property[@name='Tags' and (contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieBiker') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieBusinessMan') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieJoe') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieTomClark') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieYo'))]]/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']

/entity_classes/entity_class[property[@name='Tags' and (contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieChuck') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieInmate') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieLab') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieNurse') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombiePlagueSpitter') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieScreamer') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieSkateboarder'))]]/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']

/entity_classes/entity_class[property[@name='Tags' and (contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieDemolition') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieFatHawaiian') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieMoe') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieWightFeral'))]]/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']

/entity_classes/entity_class[property[@name='Tags' and (contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieBoe') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieMutated') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieSteve') or contains(@value,'AECbase_zombieSteveCrawler'))]]/effect_group[@name='Base Effects']
